title: Information Decay
description: Intel becomes stale over time. Route information, prices, and competitor plans change. Old intel may be misleading or wrong. Players must continuously invest to maintain current intelligence.
definition-of-done: Intel has freshness/age tracking. Old intel marked as potentially stale. Very old intel removed or flagged unreliable. Freshness visible in intel display.
testing-plan: Verify intel ages over time. Test stale marking triggers. Verify unreliable flagging. Test freshness display.
